features: FIZZ TIME: Elysium Spa Bath Bombs are an instant relaxing, refreshing, zingy addition to any bath. Simply drop in the bath, watch them fizz and enjoy a fragrant, relaxing soak
DELICIOUSLY SCENTED: Enjoy the fabulous clean fresh scent of an ocean breeze whilst relaxing in a warm bath.
BATH TRIO: Each resealable pack contains three scented bath bombs. Enjoy multiple silky smooth ocean breeze scented leisurely baths.

BUBBLE FREE: Prefer the perfect scented, silky water to relax into? Bath bombs are the perfect addition to your bath, easy to use, just add water, drop the bath bomb, watch it fizz and release the gentle ocean breeze fragrance. Relax and enjoy.
ABOUT THE PRODUCT: Resealable bag. Ready to use, triple pack
description: Product Description Elysium Spa Bath Bombs are an instant relaxing, refreshing, zingy addition to any bath. Simply drop in the bath, watch them fizz and enjoy a fragrant, relaxing soak. Enjoy the fabulous clean fresh scent of an ocean breeze whilst relaxing in a warm bath. Each resealable pack contains three scented bath bombs, enjoy multiple silky smooth ocean breeze scented leisurely baths. Prefer the prefect scented, silky water to relax into? Bath bombs are the perfect addition to your bath, easy to use, just add water, the bath bomb, watch it fizz and release the fresh, clean ocean breeze fragrance, relax and enjoy. Ready to use, ocean breeze fragranced in a resealable bag 450g. Directions Drop the bath bomb into a bathtub of warm water and let it dissolve. Safety Warning Keep out of reach of children Manufacturer Contact Information Elysium Spa Ocean Breeze Bath Bombs 3 pack See more
